channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Texas mayor confirms fatality from Brazoria County tornado
item.description: "Please join me in praying for all those impacted," Mayor Davis shared in a statement on social media, expressing condolences and support for the affected community.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Estrada, NewsNation

item.title: 15 hurt in Florida when train hits fire truck that drove onto tracks after another train passed
item.description: Three firefighters and a dozen passengers were injured in Florida on Saturday when a fire truck with its lights flashing drove around rail crossing arms and into the path of a high-speed passenger train after waiting for another train to pass, according to video of the incident and a person briefed
item.dc:creator: JOSH FUNK and JULIE WALKER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: At least 15 people injured after Florida train hits fire truck
item.description: Three firefighters and 12 Brightline passengers were injured Saturday morning following a collision between a Delray Beach Fire Rescue truck and a train.
item.dc:creator: Sierra Rains, ABC 4

item.title: Big Lots reaches deal to keep hundreds of US stores open
item.description: The discount chain Big Lots, which filed for bankruptcy protection in September, has reached a deal that will keep hundreds of its stores and distribution centers open.
item.dc:creator: Dee-Ann Durbin, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Abortions are up in the US. It's a complicated picture as women turn to pills, travel
item.description: Abortion has become slightly more common despite bans or deep restrictions in most Republican-controlled states, and the legal and political fights over its future are not over yet. It's now been two and a half years since the U.S. Supreme Court overturned Roe v.
item.dc:creator: GEOFF MULVIHILL and KEVIN S. VINEYS, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Winning ticket for $1.22 billion lottery jackpot sold in California, Mega Millions says
item.description: At least one Mega Millions player has plenty of dough to ring in the New Year after drawing the winning number.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Oldest living survivor of attack on Pearl Harbor dies at 105
item.description: Warren Upton, the oldest living survivor of the 1941 Japanese attack on Pearl Harbor and the last remaining survivor of the USS Utah, has died at age 105.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Here's how a robot massage compares to the real thing
item.description: First, you book an appointment through an app - it's sort of like getting an Uber. You pick a time and place, and it's all confirmed on the spot. A half-hour massage is $60 at the location I visited.
item.dc:creator: Rich DeMuro, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Judge scolds Jay-Z's lawyer over 'attacks' on rape accuser's attorney
item.description: Judge Analisa Torres chastised the lawyer representing Jay-Z for what she described as his combative motions and “inflammatory language” against the plaintiff's lawyer,
item.dc:creator: Larry Neumeister, WGN 9

item.title: Vote to name new baby pygmy hippo at Metro Richmond Zoo
item.description: The Metro Richmond Zoo is asking for the public's help to name its new baby pygmy hippo that the zoo welcomed just before the holidays.
item.dc:creator: Marysa Tuttle, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Another unticketed passenger attempts to stow away on a Delta flight
item.description: In the thick of holiday travel, another unticketed passenger attempted to stow away on a Delta Air Lines flight.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Former NCAA quarterback Tommy Lazzaro dies in 'tragic' accident at US Air Force base
item.description: Tommy Lazzaro, an Army sergeant and former quarterback for the Central Michigan Chippewas, has died following an accident at Eglin Air Force Base in Florida. He was 27.
item.dc:creator: Matt Jaworowski, ABC 4

item.title: SEE IT: ‘Peanut-shaped’ roundabout ready to open in Ohio
item.description: In a post to the city's Facebook page, officials offered "a few pointers to help drivers navigate safely.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Langenfeld, ABC 4

item.title: Bird flu virus in Louisiana patient likely mutated to be more transmissible, CDC says
item.description: The agency, in its latest update released Thursday, said the mutations were not found in samples taken from wild birds, suggesting the virus changed over the course of the patient’s infection.
item.dc:creator: Nathaniel Weixel, KRON4

item.title: These movies are some of 2025's most anticipated
item.description: With the vast majority of 2024 in the rearview mirror, it's time to start looking at the most anticipated films primed to take the silver screen in 2025. Full of adaptations, sequels, and reboots of beloved properties, viewers will not have difficulty finding something familiar to enjoy.
item.dc:creator: Justin Walker, WFLA, NBC

item.title: First severe human bird flu case shows mutations: CDC
item.description: Health experts are now warning pet owners to be cautious about raw foods and limit pets' exposure to wildlife.
item.dc:creator: Nancy Loo, NewsNation

item.title: Massachusetts family found dead from carbon monoxide exposure
item.description: A family from Newton, Massachusetts, have been identified as the victims found dead inside a home on Christmas Day after an apparent exposure to carbon monoxide.
item.dc:creator: Melanie DaSilva, WFLA, NBC

item.title: China sanctions 7 companies over US military assistance to Taiwan
item.description: The sanctions also come in response to the recent approval of the U.S. government's annual defense spending bill, which a Chinese Foreign Ministry statement said “includes multiple negative sections on China.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Manchin objects to Biden's commutations
item.description: Outgoing Sen. Joe Manchin (I-W.Va.) is denouncing as “misguided” and “disgusting” President Biden's move to commute the sentences of two men convicted of murdering a student at Marshall University.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, NewsNation

item.title: Mexico tests app for migrants to send alert if they're about to be detained in US
item.description: U.S. authorities are obliged to give notice to home-country consulates when a foreign citizen is detained. Mexico says it has beefed up consular staff and legal aid to help migrants in the legal process related to deportation.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Pennsylvania teacher jailed in Russia formally designated as wrongfully detained
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — An American schoolteacher arrested in Russia on drug charges more than four years ago has been designated by the U.S. government as wrongfully detained, the State Department said Friday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Fox News hosts Sean Hannity, Ainsley Earhardt announce engagement
item.description: "We are overjoyed and so thankful to our families for all of their love and support during this wonderful time in our lives," the couple said.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, NewsNation

item.title: Onion-wielding man disrupts Christmas church services, pours whiskey into holy water: deputies
item.description: A Maryland man was arrested and charged with several offences stemming from disruptions at two Catholic churches on Christmas Eve, including one disruption which he is accused of pouring liquor into a container of holy water.
item.dc:creator: Alaina Papazian, KRON4

item.title: US teacher jailed in Russia is formally designated as wrongfully detained
item.description: The State Department says an American schoolteacher arrested in Russia on drug charges more than three years ago has been designated by the U.S. government as wrongfully detained.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Man indicted in burning death of woman inside New York City subway train: prosecutors
item.description: The indictment comes days after Sebastian Zapeta’s arrest and subsequent police questioning, in which authorities say he claimed not to know what had happened but identified himself in photos and surveillance video showing the fire being lit.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Mexico tests app allowing migrants to send alert if they are about to be detained in US
item.description: U.S. authorities are obliged to give notice to home-country consulates when a foreign citizen is detained. Mexico says it has beefed up consular staff and legal aid to help migrants in the legal process related to deportation.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Boy killed in Colorado reservation shooting was in bed when he was hit
item.description: DENVER (AP) — A 7-year-old boy who died in a shooting that left 24 bullet holes in a home on a tribal reservation in Colorado was lying next to his father in bed when he was hit, according to court documents unsealed Thursday.
item.dc:creator: COLLEEN SLEVIN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Peyote sacred to Native Americans threatened by psychedelic renaissance and development
item.description: HEBBRONVILLE, Texas (AP) — In this corner of southern Texas, the plump cacti seem to pop out of arid dust and cracked earth, like magic dumplings.
item.dc:creator: DEEPA BHARATH and JESSIE WARDARSKI, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Ukrainian refugee finds peace through Tarpon Springs color guard
item.description: The holidays bring a lot of happiness for many people, especially one Tarpon Springs High School student who is thankful she can celebrate in safety here in America.
item.dc:creator: Alessandra Young, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Beyoncé's performance highlighted Netflix's NFL debut on Christmas Day
item.description: Beyoncé provided more excitement than either game during Netflix’s NFL debut on Christmas Day. Riding into her halftime appearance on a white horse, the 32-time Grammy winner rocked her hometown Houston crowd with a nearly 13-minute performance on Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: 2 killed and another hurt in shooting outside Florida IHOP
item.description: Two people were killed, and another was injured in a shooting outside an IHOP restaurant in South Florida on Wednesday, authorities said.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Mahomes throws 3 TDs as Chiefs clinch AFC's top seed by breezing past the skidding Steelers 29-10
item.description: PITTSBURGH (AP) — Andy Reid donned a Santa Claus suit in a giddy Kansas City Chiefs locker room on Christmas Day, then handed his team a present it increasingly looks like it deserves: home-field advantage throughout the AFC playoffs.
item.dc:creator: WILL GRAVES, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Bill Bergey, a Pro Bowl linebacker for the Eagles, dies at 79
item.description: Bill Bergey, a five-time Pro Bowl linebacker who played in a Super Bowl for the Philadelphia Eagles, died Wednesday, the team announced. He was 79.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Jackpot for Mega Millions over $1 billion after no numbers match on Christmas Eve drawing
item.description: Hang onto those stocking-stuffer lottery tickets. The Mega Millions jackpot has surpassed $1 billion after no ticket matched all six numbers drawn on Christmas Eve.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Biden signs a bill officially making the bald eagle the national bird of the US
item.description: The bald eagle, a symbol of the power and strength of the United States for more than 240 years, earned an overdue honor on Tuesday: It officially became the country's national bird.
item.dc:creator: DARLENE SUPERVILLE, Associated Press, WFLA, NBC
